title: alstroemeria garaventae subsp. garaventae
intro: Alstroemeria garaventae subsp. garaventae is a species of flowering plant in the family Alstroemeriaceae, commonly known as the Peruvian lily or garaventa's lily. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alstroemeria garaventae subsp. garaventae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the flowers or roots in hot water to create a medicinal tea, which can be used to treat various ailments.
